_note: Real reviews only. Never invent a review, a rating or a count - it breaks Google's policy (manual penalty) and the StaticSwift constitution. Add each genuine review below, then run: node scripts/build-reviews.mjs . Stars appear on the homepage (visible text + schema) only when real reviews exist here.

items.author: Beth Maloney
items.text: I got Harry to create my drop shipping website, the quality and time it took was nothing short of amazing, recommend highly.
